description: Join the numbers and get to the 2048 tile! A minimalist puzzle game that's easy to play and hard to master.

title: Tetris
description: The world's most popular block-stacking puzzle game. Rotate and place pieces to clear lines.

title: Snake
description: Classic snake game. Eat the food, grow longer, don't hit the walls. A simple yet addictive challenge.

title: Chess
description: The ultimate game of strategy. Play against the computer or friends in this 64-square battlefield.

title: Slope
description: Navigate a ball down a treacherous, ever-changing neon slope. Speed and agility are key in this high-octane run.

title: Cookie Clicker
description: The original idle game about clicking cookies. Bake millions of cookies to buy grandmas, farms, and space stations.

title: Minecraft Classic
description: The original creative experience of Minecraft. Build anything you can imagine with 32 blocks in your browser.

title: Flappy Bird
description: The legendary frustrating game of flapping through pipes. How high can your score go?
